title: No Baby Zombies
description: Despawns Baby Zombies right after spawning.
body:
**Are you bored of those annoying baby zombies?**

This simple mod will get rid of your problem.

<details>
<summary>Description</summary>

I could't find any mod like this for Minecraft version 1.19.2 for the forge modloader, so I quickly made this one.

Because I don't want to mess with the spawning mechanism, I only despawn every baby zombie after spawning. As a result, the baby zombie can be seen briefly before it disappears.

_This mod was made with the help of MCreator_

</details>
